ast.name: log
ast.source: If randomize option is set to false, then quality option must be 'default' or 'proof'.
ast.target: 如果随机化选项设置为 false，则质量选项必须为 'default' 或 'proof'。

ast.name: log
ast.source: not scaling solution: zero size detected
ast.target: 未缩放解决方案：检测到零大小

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Log plugin startup, renderer patching, and elk routing decisions to the developer console.
ast.target: 将插件启动、渲染器修补和 elk 路由决策记录到开发者控制台。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prevent labels like '1. Step' from being interpreted as Markdown lists by Mermaid.
ast.target: 防止像 '1. Step' 这样的标签被 Mermaid 解释为 Markdown 列表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text used inside the Mermaid comment marker. The default marker is %% elk %%.
ast.target: 在 Mermaid 注释标记内使用的文本。默认标记是 %% elk %%。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Route every Mermaid diagram through elk, even when the marker is not present.
ast.target: 即使标记不存在，也通过 elk 路由每个 Mermaid 图表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Replace an existing Mermaid layout value with elk when a diagram is routed through this plugin.
ast.target: 当图表通过此插件路由时，用 elk 替换现有的 Mermaid 布局值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional default look for routed diagrams. Existing diagram config wins if present.
ast.target: 路由图表的可选默认外观。如果存在现有图表配置，则优先使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Regex used to detect numbered list markers inside labels. Advanced. Mildly cursed.
ast.target: 用于检测标签内有序列表标记的正则表达式。高级。略有风险。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the Mermaid documentation for newer diagram types, syntax, and examples.
ast.target: 打开 Mermaid 文档以获取更新的图表类型、语法和示例。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Restore all plugin options to their defaults.
ast.target: 将所有插件选项恢复为默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: View source code, releases, and documentation.
ast.target: 查看源代码、发布版本和文档。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Found a bug or have a request? Please open an issue in the repository.
ast.target: 发现错误或有请求？请在仓库中提交一个问题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Copies current plugin settings and recent logs for pasting into an issue.
ast.target: 复制当前插件设置和最近的日志，以便粘贴到问题中。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 将 elk 应用于所有图表

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 带引号的标签正则表达式

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 带括号的标签正则表达式

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: KaTeX doesn't work in quirks mode. Make sure your website has a suitable doctype.
ast.target: 警告：KaTeX 在怪异模式下无法工作。请确保您的网站具有合适的文档类型。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Cluster without external connections, without a parent and with children
ast.target: 没有外部连接、没有父节点且有子节点的集群

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 从递归渲染 XAX 返回

ast.name: warn
ast.source: flowchart-elk was moved to an external package in Mermaid v11. Please refer [release notes](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/releases/tag/v11.0.0) for more details. This diagram will be rendered using `dagre` layout as a fallback.
ast.target: flowchart-elk 在 Mermaid v11 中已移至外部包。请参阅[发行说明](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/releases/tag/v11.0.0)了解更多详情。此图表将使用 `dagre` 布局作为后备方案进行渲染。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The difference between the min and max time is more than 5 years. This will cause performance issues. Skipping drawing exclude days.
ast.target: 最小和最大时间之间的差异超过 5 年。这会导致性能问题。跳过绘制排除日期。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: ⚠️ Invalid or missing stateId from key:
ast.target: ⚠️ 来自键的 stateId 无效或缺失：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: ⚠️ Could not find node matching text:
ast.target: ⚠️ 无法找到匹配文本的节点：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: ⚠️ Node has no parent, cannot wrap:
ast.target: ⚠️ 节点没有父节点，无法包装：

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
Web worker requested but 'web-worker' package not installed. 
Consider installing the package or pass your own 'workerFactory' to ELK's constructor.
... Falling back to non-web worker version.
ast.target: 请求了 Web worker，但未安装 'web-worker' 包。\n请考虑安装该包或将您自己的 'workerFactory' 传递给 ELK 的构造函数。\n... 回退到非 Web worker 版本。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: POI cutter2: Invalid points from cutter2, falling back to prevPoints
ast.target: POI cutter2：来自 cutter2 的点无效，回退到 prevPoints

ast.name: warn
ast.source: mermaid.init is deprecated. Please use run instead.
ast.target: mermaid.init 已弃用。请改用 run。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: clipboard copy failed, showing fallback notice
ast.target: 剪贴板复制失败，显示后备通知

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 剪贴板 API 不可用

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Debug report copied. Paste it into your GitHub issue.
ast.target: 调试报告已复制。请将其粘贴到您的 GitHub issue 中。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not copy debug report automatically. Open console logs and copy manually.
ast.target: 无法自动复制调试报告。请打开控制台日志并手动复制。

ast.name: body
ast.source: <g><rect width="80" height="80" style="fill: #087ebf; stroke-width: 0px;"/><text transform="translate(21.16 64.67)" style="fill: #fff; font-family: ArialMT, Arial; font-size: 67.75px;"><tspan x="0" y="0">?</tspan></text></g>
ast.target: <g><rect width=\"80\" height=\"80\" style=\"fill: #087ebf; stroke-width: 0px;\"/><text transform=\"translate(21.16 64.67)\" style=\"fill: #fff; font-family: ArialMT, Arial; font-size: 67.75px;\"><tspan x=\"0\" y=\"0\">?</tspan></text></g>

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render math in display mode, which puts the math in display style (so \int and \sum are large, for example), and centers the math on the page on its own line.
ast.target: 以显示模式渲染数学公式，这会将数学公式置于显示样式（例如，\\int 和 \\sum 会变大），并将数学公式居中显示在页面的独立行上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the markup language of the output.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render display math in leqno style (left-justified tags).
ast.target: 以 leqno 样式（左对齐标签）渲染显示数学公式。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 将显示数学公式左对齐渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Makes \color behave like LaTeX's 2-argument \textcolor, instead of LaTeX's one-argument \color mode change.
ast.target: 使 \\color 的行为类似于 LaTeX 的双参数 \\textcolor，而不是 LaTeX 的单参数 \\color 模式更改。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Turn on strict / LaTeX faithfulness mode, which throws an error if the input uses features that are not supported by LaTeX.
ast.target: 开启严格 / LaTeX 忠实模式，如果输入使用了 LaTeX 不支持的功能，将抛出错误。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trust the input, enabling all HTML features such as \url.
ast.target: 信任输入，启用所有 HTML 功能，例如 \\url。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Limit the number of macro expansions to the specified number, to prevent e.g. infinite macro loops. If set to Infinity, the macro expander will try to fully expand as in LaTeX.
ast.target: 将宏展开次数限制为指定数量，以防止例如无限宏循环。如果设置为 Infinity，宏展开器将尝试像 LaTeX 一样完全展开。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fork or join in process flow

ast.name: description
ast.source: This Object indicates the Parser is during Recording Phase
ast.target: 此对象表示解析器处于录制阶段

ast.name: message
ast.source:
Warning: No LINE_BREAKS Found.
	This Lexer has been defined to track line and column information,
	But none of the Token Types can be identified as matching a line terminator.
	See https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/resolving_lexer_errors.html#LINE_BREAKS 
	for details.
ast.target:
警告：未找到 LINE_BREAKS。
	此词法分析器已定义用于跟踪行和列信息，
	但没有任何令牌类型可被识别为匹配行终止符。
	请参阅 https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/resolving_lexer_errors.html#LINE_BREAKS 
	了解详情。

ast.name: name
ast.source:
This CSTNode indicates the Parser is in Recording Phase
	See: https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/internals.html#grammar-recording for details
ast.target: 此CST节点表示解析器处于录制阶段\n\t详情请参阅：https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/internals.html#grammar-recording

ast.name: text
ast.source: Settings may not apply reliably until Obsidian is restarted.
ast.target: 设置可能需要重启Obsidian才能可靠生效。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Do not touch unless you know what you're doing
ast.target: 除非你清楚自己在做什么，否则请勿触碰

ast.name: text
ast.source: Regex overrides live here. If everything already works, this section is mostly a trap with form controls.
ast.target: 正则表达式覆盖项在此处。如果一切正常，此部分大多是一个带有表单控件的陷阱。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This option makes the plugin load the newer Mermaid runtime from the plugin itself instead of Obsidian's older bundled Mermaid. Use it when examples from the official Mermaid docs do not work in plain Obsidian yet.
ast.target: 此选项使插件从自身加载较新的Mermaid运行时，而非Obsidian较旧的捆绑版本。当官方Mermaid文档中的示例在普通Obsidian中尚无法使用时，请启用此选项。
